Back to website Python lab Docs index

Mirrored.Py

Clean code reading view for studying, copying, and comparing your own implementation.

emergency-path/.venv/Lib/site-packages/fontTools/unicodedata/Mirrored.py

Runs the exact Python code shown below. Output is saved in this browser.


    

    
    
    

      
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
#
# NOTE: The mappings in this file were generated from the command line:
# cat BidiMirroring.txt | grep "^[0-9A-F]" | sed "s/;//" | awk '{print "    0x"$1": 0x"$2","}'
#
# Source: http://www.unicode.org/Public/UNIDATA/BidiMirroring.txt
# License: http://unicode.org/copyright.html#License
#
# BidiMirroring-16.0.0.txt
# Date: 2024-01-30
# © 2024 Unicode®, Inc.
# Unicode and the Unicode Logo are registered trademarks of Unicode, Inc. in the U.S. and other countries.
# For terms of use and license, see https://www.unicode.org/terms_of_use.html
#
# Unicode Character Database
# For documentation, see https://www.unicode.org/reports/tr44/
MIRRORED = {
    0x0028: 0x0029,
    0x0029: 0x0028,
    0x003C: 0x003E,
    0x003E: 0x003C,
    0x005B: 0x005D,
